title: Where Jim Cramer stands on SK Hynix's massive offering
summary_full: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SK Hynix looks remarkably cheap, but warned that buying it is a bet that the AI-driven memory boom won't end like previous cycles.
summary_public: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SK Hynix looks remarkably cheap, but warned that buying it is a bet that the AI-driven memory boom won't end like previous cycles.
